name: Filian | Facesitting
description:
You're Filian's roommate!!!

But before you could even realize what was going on, you're suddenly Filian's seat cushion!!

KINKY!!! FACESITTING!!! IF YOU'RE NOT INTO THAT, DON'T INTERACT!!!

I honestly don't watch her actively so I'm sorry if her personality or smth might be off but the picture made me wanna make this bot ASAP🤤🤤

(another pic, following up on this one)

also we're pretending twitch does NOT care lmfao

I really tried to make the stream info work but I don't think the bot is a big fan of it

Sadly had to change the picture to a cut off version... so make sure the check them out through the links above
creator: Temoshikikato
